title: Jon (disambiguation)
content:
'''Jon''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Jon (Jedi)|Jon]]''', a [[Jedi youngling]] from the [[High Republic Era]]
*'''[[Jon (rebel)|Jon]]''', a rebel who worked at [[Loi'e's Follies]]
*'''[[Jon Melton]]''', the nephew of [[Qi'ra]]
*'''[[Jon Vander]]''', also known as '''Dutch''', [[Gold Leader]] during the [[Battle of Yavin]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Jon (Corellian)|Jon]]''', a Corellian living during the [[Galactic War]]
*'''[[Jon (farmer)|Jon]]''', a farmer on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]
*'''[[Jon Antilles]]''', a pseudonym adopted by a mysterious [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]
*'''[[Jon Arco]]''', [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who disappeared with his ship at some point before the [[Galactic War]]
*'''[[Jon Brygies]]''', [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] stationed on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]]
*'''[[Jon Vander/Legends|Jon Vander]]''', also known as '''Dutch''', [[Gold Leader/Legends|Gold Leader]] during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]
*'''[[Davod Jon]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]]

*'''[[Jon Adams]]
*'''[[Jon Berg]]''', special effect artist

*'''[[Jon Stewart]]'''
*'''[[Jon Trux]]''', editor of ''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly]]''
*'''[[Jon Waterhouse]]'''
*'''[[Walter Jon Williams]]'''
